title: Module 5 Learning Resource Selection Flowchart
description: A decision flowchart to guide learners in selecting the most appropriate resource type based on their current learning need and preference.
relationships: Directs learner from a starting question ('What is your current learning need?') through a series of decision points (e.g., 'Need deep theoretical understanding?' -> 'Yes' leads to 'Foundational Theory Text') to a recommended resource type.
